dashboard.subtitle: SPL herd pools on Solana with real-time dividend routing
dashboard.title: Tokenize herd ownership, trade it peer-to-peer, and stream cow-sale dividends to wallets.
dashboard.description: CowChain models a Solana herd pool where each SPL token is a fractional claim on a cow collective. Buy CowChain tokens, fill market orders, and claim dividends the moment the farm exits livestock.
dashboard.partnersDesc: Tokenized herd pools participating in the platform.
dashboard.soldAndRouted: {{tag}} sold and routed to token holders

features.navMintingDesc: Platform inventory is minted against herd NAV so each SPL share maps to a fractional claim on the pool.
features.dividendStreamingDesc: Sold cows distribute proceeds pro-rata to holders and only nudge NAV down slightly to reflect lower herd inventory.
features.p2pMatchingDesc: Buyers settle in SOL while the listing engine transfers herd tokens in the same workflow.

footer.description: Tokenize herd pools, trade SPL herd shares, and stream dividends after each cow sale.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Dashboard
portfolio.desc: Track token balances, herd-share exposure, and dividends earned across all herd pools.

txns.txn-2: Matched P2P order on Sunrise Valley Farm
txns.txn-3: Minted herd shares at NAV for Green Pastures Co-op

analytics.title: Platform Analytics
analytics.desc: Monitor CowChain token price spreads, dividend throughput, and the ledger mechanics backing the Solana herd token demo.
analytics.splMintingDesc: Direct buys mint CowChain tokens at the current price while reducing platform inventory. Portfolio balances update immediately for the connected wallet.
analytics.dividendLedgerDesc: Each cow sale appends a dividend event and allocates pending payouts by the formula tokens_owned / total_tokens * sale_price.
analytics.matchingEngineDesc: Marketplace fills consume listings, settle SOL from buyer to seller, and transfer herd shares to the buyer in one logical trade flow.
analytics.actionsRetained: wallet and matching actions retained in activity log

farmer.createFarmDesc: Fill in the details to register a new farm.
farmer.modalSellCowDesc: CowChain price will be recalculated and dividends distributed to investors

marketplace.title: P2P Marketplace
marketplace.desc: Buyers fill existing listings in SOL while receiving herd tokens at the matched price. Sort by herd, price, or return spread against NAV.
marketplace.reviewTx: Review the transaction details before confirming your trade in SOL. The amount will be deducted directly from your phantom wallet balance.

auth.signInDesc: Use your email/password or continue with Google and GitHub.
auth.invalidCreds: Invalid credentials or email is not verified yet.
auth.createAccountDesc: Enter your email below to create your account.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.desc: Answers to common questions about CowChain.
faq.a1: CowChain is a platform where herd pools are tokenized so users can buy, hold, and trade herd shares with transparent portfolio tracking.
faq.q2: How do I start using the platform?
faq.a2: Create an account, verify your email, connect your wallet, and then open Marketplace or Herd pages to explore available pools.
faq.a3: Yes. If your Phantom wallet is on devnet, CowChain balance tools will try to detect and use that network for wallet balance checks.
faq.a4: Dividends are reflected in your portfolio metrics, and you can claim available rewards from your profile when they are ready.
faq.a5: No. CowChain provides tooling and analytics only and does not provide financial, legal, or tax advice.

contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: Свяжитесь с командой разработчиков MilkChain напрямую через Telegram.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.desc: Documentation is temporarily unavailable. We are preparing a full developer and user guide.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. We collect only information needed to provide core platform functionality, such as account authentication, security monitoring, and product improvement. We do not sell your personal data.
privacy.p2: Data may include account details, wallet identifiers you choose to connect, and technical logs required to prevent abuse and maintain service reliability. We apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect your information.
privacy.p3: By using the platform, you acknowledge this policy. If you have questions about your data, use the Contact page once support channels are published.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1: By accessing or using CowChain, you agree to use the service in compliance with applicable laws and these terms. You are responsible for your account credentials, wallet actions, and all activity performed under your account.
terms.p2: The platform is provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis without warranties of any kind. We may update, suspend, or discontinue features at any time to maintain service quality, security, and legal compliance.
terms.p3: Nothing on CowChain constitutes financial, investment, legal, or tax advice. You assume all risks related to digital assets and market activity.

herdDetails.notFoundDesc: The herd you're looking for doesn't exist.
herdDetails.variantPayout: Variant 2 payout: sale revenue is distributed proportionally to token holders, while NAV decreases only slightly.
